summary: Backend tests for 3 bug fixes on program-reveal page. All 8 tests passed: (1) trainingDays correctly reflects user's selected frequency (3/4/5 verified), (2) Competition Prep phase absent when hasCompetition=false, replaced by 'Strength Consolidation' as Phase 6, (3) Competition Prep phase present when hasCompetition=true or competitionDate is set, (4) GET /api/plan/year returns correct trainingDays after intake.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created; used existing user_a@theprogram.app with profile reset before each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: trainingDays from frequency, Competition Prep phase gated by hasCompetition/competitionDate. plan_generator.py uses PHASE_TEMPLATES_NO_COMP correctly. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_competition_training_days.py
